title: No spicy food please
englishNote: Show this when ordering — means 'no spicy food, thank you'

title: I am vegetarian
englishNote: Show this when ordering — means 'I am vegetarian, I don't eat meat'
pinyin: Wǒ chī sù, bù chī ròu

title: No pork please
englishNote: Show this when ordering — means 'no pork please, thank you'

title: Do you have an English menu?
englishNote: Ask the waiter — means 'do you have an English menu?'

title: Bill please
englishNote: Show to your waiter when you want to pay

title: Take me to this address
englishNote: Show this to a taxi driver, then point to the address on the map
pinyin: Qǐng sòng wǒ qù zhège dìzhǐ

title: Take me to the airport
englishNote: Show this to a taxi driver — means 'please take me to the airport'

title: Take me to the train station
englishNote: Show this to a taxi driver — means 'please take me to the train station'

title: Please slow down
englishNote: Show to a taxi driver — means 'please drive slower'

title: I have a reservation
chineseText: 我有预订，这是我的护照
englishNote: Show at hotel reception — means 'I have a reservation, here is my passport'
pinyin: Wǒ yǒu yùdìng, zhè shì wǒ de hùzhào

title: What is the WiFi password?
englishNote: Ask hotel staff — means 'what is the WiFi password?'

title: No hot water in my room
englishNote: Show to hotel staff — means 'there is no hot water in my room'

title: How much does this cost?
englishNote: Point to the item — means 'how much does this cost?'

title: Too expensive, can you discount?
chineseText: 太贵了，可以便宜一点吗？
englishNote: Use at markets — means 'too expensive, can you give a discount?'
pinyin: Tài guì le, kěyǐ piányí yīdiǎn ma?

title: I will pay by WeChat Pay
englishNote: Show at checkout — means 'I will pay with WeChat Pay'

title: I will pay by Alipay
englishNote: Show at checkout — means 'I will pay with Alipay'

title: Call an ambulance
chineseText: 请帮我叫救护车，这是紧急情况
englishNote: Show to bystanders — means 'please call an ambulance, this is an emergency'
pinyin: Qǐng bāng wǒ jiào jiùhùchē, zhè shì jǐnjí qíngkuàng

title: Call the police
englishNote: Show to bystanders — means 'please call the police'

title: I lost my passport
chineseText: 我的护照丢了，请问最近的派出所在哪里？
englishNote: Show to police or hotel staff — means 'I lost my passport, where is the nearest police station?'
pinyin: Wǒ de hùzhào diū le, qǐngwèn zuìjìn de pàichūsuǒ zài nǎlǐ?

title: I don't understand, please write it down
englishNote: Show when confused — asks someone to write down what they mean
pinyin: Wǒ tīng bù dǒng, néng xiě xiàlái ma?

title: Please type it here for me
chineseText: 请帮我打出来，我用翻译软件
englishNote: Ask someone to type so you can translate it — means 'please type it for me, I'll use a translation app'
pinyin: Qǐng bāng wǒ dǎ chūlái, wǒ yòng fānyì ruǎnjiàn

title: Where is the toilet?
englishNote: Ask anyone nearby — means 'where is the toilet?'
